title: TopBuild (BLD) Q4 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
text: Timing: Earnings report released Thursday before market open. Revenue Expectations: Analysts anticipate Q4 revenue growth of 13.5% year-over-year, a significant improvement from the 2% increase in the prior-year quarter. The company previously beat revenue expectations last quarter with $1.39 billion in revenues. Analyst Sentiment: Analysts covering the company have generally reconfirmed their estimates over the last 30 days, suggesting confidence in continued business performance. However, TopBuild has a mixed track record, having missed Wall Street's revenue estimates multiple times over the last two years. Valuation Context: The stock trades near analyst price targets, with the average target at $503.80 compared to a share price of $510.63. Peer Comparison: Recent results from competitors show mixed signals—Taylor Morrison's revenues declined 10.9% but beat expectations, while Champion Homes reported flat growth. The broader homebuilding sector has posted average gains of 5.7% over the preceding month, with TopBuild up 6.3%.
